glossary.application_status: Halka codsigan ku yaal tubada bixiyaha. Qabyad = lama gudbin; La gudbiyay = sugaya in la siiyo; Dib u eegis hoos timaadda; Dhibco la siiyay = sugaya go'aanka; La bixiyay/La diiday = ugu dambeeya.
glossary.capacity_assessment: Qiimeyn nafteed oo qaab dhismeed ah oo isticmaalaysa hannaan la aqoonsan yahay (Kuja, STEP, UN-HACT, CHS, NUPAS) oo qiimeysa ururkaaga awoodda, maamulka, maaliyada, iyo barnaamijyada. Bixiyayaasha way tixgeliyaan markay codsiyada eegayaan.
glossary.compliance: Hubin joogto ah: baaritaanka cunaqabataynta (UN/OFAC/EU), xaqiijinta diiwaanka dawladda, iyo xaaladda warbixinta deeqda. Bixiyayaasha waxay arkaan jawi cagaaran/hurdi/cas qof kasta oo helay deeqda.
glossary.eligibility: Shuruudaha ururkaagu ay tahay inuu buuxiyo ka hor inta aanad codsan — dalka, qaybta, diiwaangelinta, cabbirka miisaaniyada, iwm. Bixiyaha ayaa dejiya.
glossary.readiness_score: Dhibco 0-100 ah oo muujinaya sida codsigaaga deeqda ee xiga loo arko inuu yahay tartame. Cusboonaysiinta tooska ah marka dukumiintigaaga, codsiyada, iyo awoodaada is bedelaan.
glossary.rubric: Hannaanka qiimeynta ee ay isticmaalaan dib u eegayaasha. Shuruud kasta waxaa leh miisaan; wadarta miisaaminta waxay noqotaa dhibcaha codsigaaga.

proximate.disbursements.recorded_subtitl: U dir shariika linkigan WhatsApp, SMS, ama iimayl. Uma baahna akoon Kuja.

proximate.disbursements.window_hint: Caadi ahaan 14 maalmood. Ka gaabi gargaarka degdegga ah, ka dheerayso hawlaha toddobaadyada badan.

proximate.donor.assurance.failed: Xirmada lama samayn karin: {reason}. Waxba lama soo dejin.
proximate.donor.assurance.hint_grant: Deeqda oo dhan: is-waafajinta lacagta wareeg kasta, waxsoosaarka marka la barbardhigo bartilmaameedyada, taariikhda warbixinnada iyo barroosinka hanti-dhawrka.
proximate.donor.assurance.hint_round: Wareeggan bilow ilaa dhammaad: waxa la sii daayay, cidda warbixisay, waxa la xaqiijiyay, iyo barroosinka hanti-dhawrka.
proximate.donor.assurance.not_pdf: Serferku PDF ma soo celin, sidaas darteed waxba lama soo dejin. Fadlan u sheeg guddiga kormeerka.
proximate.donor.explain.allocated.body: Lacag loo goonisay wareeg maalgelin oo gaar ah. Waxay leedahay ujeedo iyo miisaaniyad, laakiin akoonka kama bixin.
proximate.donor.explain.allocated.title: La qoondeeyay
proximate.donor.explain.assurance_pack.b: Hal PDF oo ay ku jiraan is-waafajinta lacagta, warbixinnada lataliyayaasha, natiijooyinka xaqiijinta iyo barroosinka hanti-dhawrka — si aad si toos ah ugu gudbiso hanti-dhawrkaaga.
proximate.donor.explain.audit_anchor.bod: Tallaabo kasta oo lacag-bixin ah waxaa lagu qoraa diiwaan halkaas oo gal kastaa shaabadeeyo kii ka horreeyay. Barroosinku waa lambarka tixraaca shaabaddaas: haddii diiwaan hore la beddelo, shaabadaha isku iman maayaan waxaana muuqan lahaa isbeddelka. Waxay caddaynaysaa in diiwaanka aan dib loo tafatirin tan iyo markii la qoray — ma aha in uu run ahaa markii la qorayay.
proximate.donor.explain.audit_anchor.sho: Waxay caddaynaysaa in diiwaanka aan dib loo tafatirin.
proximate.donor.explain.committed.body: Lacag aad si rasmi ah ugu heshiisay inaad bixiso heshiis deeq oo la saxiixay. Waa ballan warqad ku qoran — weli waxba ma dhaqaaqin.
proximate.donor.explain.committed.title: La ballanqaaday
proximate.donor.explain.disbursed.body: Lacag dhab ahaan loo diray hay'ad iskaashi. Lacag-bixin kastaa waxay magacawdaa lataliyaha, qadarka iyo jidka ay martay.
proximate.donor.explain.disbursed.title: La bixiyay
proximate.donor.explain.flagged.body: Guddiga kormeerku wuxuu warbixinta ka helay wax uusan sidiisa u aqbali karin wuuna u hakiyay la-socod. Calaamaddu waa su'aal furan, ma aha caddayn xadgudub.
proximate.donor.explain.flagged.title: La calaamadeeyay
proximate.donor.explain.outcome_check.bo: Qiyaastii 90 maalmood ka dib marka lacag-bixinta la xaqiijiyo, lataliyaha ayaa mar kale la weydiiyaa in natiijadu sii jirtay iyo in kale. Tani waxay qabataa shaqo wakhtigaas fiicnayd oo aan sii jirin. "Sugitaan" macnaheedu waa in 90-ka maalmood aanay weli dhammaan — ma aha in wax qaldan jiraan.
proximate.donor.explain.outcome_check.sh: Eegis labaad qiyaastii 90 maalmood ka dib — natiijadu ma sii jirtay?
proximate.donor.explain.reported.body: Lataliyuhu wuxuu soo diray sharraxaad ku saabsan waxa uu lacagta ku sameeyay. Warbixintu waa hadalka lataliyaha laftiisa — marxaladdan cidna madax-bannaan ma hubin.
proximate.donor.explain.reported.title: La soo warramay
proximate.donor.explain.verified.body: Guddiga kormeerku wuxuu dib u eegay warbixinta lataliyaha isagoo la barbardhigay caddaymaha faylka ku jira wuuna aqbalay. Kani waa hubin dukumeenti, ma aha hanti-dhawr goob-joog ah.
proximate.donor.explain.verified.title: La xaqiijiyay
proximate.donor.explain.verifier_attesta: Qof aan dan ku lahayn lacag-bixinta ayaa la weydiiyaa inuu xaqiijiyo hawsha si ka madax-bannaan lataliyaha iyo guddiga kormeerka. Jawaabtiisa waa la diiwaangeliyaa hadday ku raacdo iyo hadday diiddoba. Waa hubinta hal qof, ma aha hanti-dhawr buuxa.
Qof aan danaynayn ayaa si gaar ah u xaqiijiya hawsha.

tour.admin.s1.body: Mowjadda dhibaatooyinka waxay calaamadisaa qaababka aan caadiga ahayn — kororka codsiyada la diiday, safafka dib-u-eegista oo gaabin, natiijooyinka xaqiijinta oo laga shakisan yahay.
tour.admin.s1.title: Hawl-gallada hal jeer
tour.admin.s2.body: Wac kasta oo AI ah ee madasha way diiwaan gashan yahay — qiimaha guusha, tokens, kala qaybinta endpoint kasta. Kashif dib-u-noqoshooyinka kahor isticmaalayaasha.
tour.admin.s2.title: Bordhada caafimaadka AI tooska ah
tour.admin.s3.body: Bordhada kalsoonida hoggaaminta, jadwalada hubinta, xaqiijin lagu qoray hawlaha burburinta — kani waa madasha guddi maamulku ku kalsoonaan karo inuu maaraysto sanduuq.
tour.admin.s3.title: Habee oo kalsoonow
tour.donor.s1.body: Xukunka maanta wuxuu isku duubaa 3-5 arrimood oo u baahan dareenkaaga toddobaadkan — laga soo qaaday AI iyada oo ku saleysan deeqahaaga, codsiyadaada iyo astaamaha khatarta dhabta ah.
tour.donor.s1.title: Xarunta amarka portfolio-gaaga
tour.donor.s2.body: Jaantus walba wuxuu leeyahay faallo "sidaas darteed" oo ay qortay AI. Eeg dashboard 10 ilbiriqsi, ma aha 10 daqiiqo.
tour.donor.s2.title: Jaantusyo leh faallooyinka AI
tour.donor.s3.body: Ku taabo dhalaalka cidhifka midig wakhti kasta. Weydii Co-pilot caafimaadka portfolio, qor RFP cusub, ama raadi qaababka codsiyada la diiday.
tour.donor.s3.title: Co-pilot mar walba waa hal taabasho oo kale
tour.donor.s4.body: "Samee deeq" hoosteeda, Kuja waxay soo jeedisaa shuruudaha u-qalmidda, miisaanka qiimeynta iyo shuruudaha warbixinta oo la jaanqaaday yoolkaaga, mawduuca iyo juqraafiga.
tour.donor.s4.title: Naqshadeyso deeqaha AI
tour.near.admin.console.body: Tani waa shaybaadhka maaree: tubada xubinnimada, ku-dhawaaqyada firfircoon, garaaca Sanduuqa Isbeddelka, iyo Warbixinta Kormeerka Xaaladaha Degdegga.
tour.near.admin.console.title: Konsole-ka maamulaha {network}
tour.near.admin.crisis.body: Guddiga Kormeerka wuxuu dib u eegaa xaaladaha degdegga ah toddobaadkii. Safafka leh natiijada sare (HDI + awoodda dawladda + dadka saameeyay + heerka feejignaanta) ayaa noqda musharaxiinta ku-dhawaaqista.
tour.near.admin.crisis.title: Kormeerka xaaladaha degdegga
tour.near.admin.declarations.body: Saxiixyo badan oo leh ka-baxa COI — saxiixa kasta waxaa lagu daawanaa hanjabaadda. Ku-dhawaaqyada la firfircooneeyay si toos ah ayey u abuuraan deeqaha la doortay si la sii daayo.
tour.near.admin.declarations.title: Ku-dhawaaqyada degdegga
tour.near.admin.memberships.body: Codsiyada cusub waxay u baahan yihiin dib u eegis Guddiga Kormeerka. Ka maamul habka kalsoonida (cunaqabateynta, diiwaanka, warbaahinta xun) oo hubi qiimaynta awoodda ka hor ansixinta.
tour.near.admin.memberships.title: Dib u eegista xubinnimada
tour.near.donor.welcome.body: {network} waxay tahay deeq-bixiyaha laftiisa: ma jiro doorka deeq-bixiye gooni ah halkan. Isticmaal konsole-ka maamulaha si aad u maamusho deeqaha.
tour.near.donor.welcome.title: Ku soo dhowoow {network}
tour.near.ngo.capacity.body: Qaab dhismeedka awoodda ayaa go'aamiya u-qalmistaada. Ka qaad inta lagu jiro qabqabashada oo cusboonaysii sannad walba — Guddiga Kormeerka ayaa arka natijadaada.
tour.near.ngo.capacity.title: Qiimaynta awoodda
tour.near.ngo.compliance.body: Warbixinada waxaa loo kala saaray deeqaha. Soo dir warbixinada horumarka, kuwa maaliyadda iyo kuwa kama dambeysa toos ka kaadhka deeqda kasta; muddooyinka waa la midabbeeyey.
tour.near.ngo.compliance.title: U-hoggaansanaanta iyo warbixinta
tour.near.ngo.copilot.body: Wax kasta weydii xilliyada saaran, ku-dhawaaqyada aad codsan kartid, ama sida loo akhriyo natiijadaada.
tour.near.ngo.copilot.title: Kaaliye
tour.near.ngo.welcome.body: Waxaad xubin ka tahay shabakaddan. Dashboard-kani waxay muujinaysaa deeqaha aad heshay, waxa la rabo, iyo halka shabakadu kaa rabto.
tour.near.ngo.welcome.title: Ku soo dhowoow {network}
tour.near.reviewer.welcome.body: {network} waa shabakad xiran — dib u eegayaasha waxay u shaqeeyaan habka shaqada Guddiga Kormeerka halkii ay ka shaqayn lahaayeen guddiyo madax-bannaan.
tour.near.reviewer.welcome.title: Ku soo dhowoow {network}
tour.ngo.s1.body: Calaamad 0-100 oo muujinaysa sida codsigaaga xiga loo arko inuu yahay tartame. AI ayaa cusboonaysiisa marka dukumiintigaaga, codsiyadaada iyo awoodaada is bedelaan.
tour.ngo.s1.title: Dhibcaha diyaargarowga
tour.ngo.s2.body: Saddexda tallaabo halkan ah waxaa loo kala saaray saamaynta dhibcaha diyaargarowga — oo leh kor u qaadid la qiyaasay tallaabo kasta.
tour.ngo.s2.title: Tallaabooyinka xiga ee AI ay tababartay
tour.ngo.s3.body: Deeq kasta waxay muujisaa ku habboonaanta AI ay qiyaastay + suurtagalka guulaysiga + waxa ka maqan profile-kaaga. Ku diirsho meesha aad ku guulaysan doonto.
tour.ngo.s3.title: Eeg deeqaha si caqli leh
tour.ngo.s4.body: Ma ku jirtaa qayb? Ku taabo dhalaalka. Co-pilot wuxuu ku saleeyaa talo kasta codsiyadaadii hore — marna ma ahan guud.
tour.ngo.s4.title: Co-pilot adigu wuu ku la qoraa
tour.reviewer.s1.body: Hawlaha laguu xilsaaray waxaa loo kala saaray mudnaanta dib u eegista — mararka u dambeeya, adkaanta iyo u-eegga codsiyada hore ee dhibcaha sare.
tour.reviewer.s1.title: Saf AI-gu hormarsaday
tour.reviewer.s2.body: Doori 2-5 codsi si aad u barbar dhigto. AI waxay isku xirtaa awoodaha, daciifnimadaada iyo waxay calaamadiyaa codsiyo isugu jira oo laga shakisan yahay.
tour.reviewer.s2.title: Habka isbarbardhigga
tour.reviewer.s3.body: AI waxay hore u buuxisaa sababaha shuruud kasta oo qiimeyn ah iyada oo isticmaalaysa waxa ku jira codsiga. Adigu waad tafatirtaa oo waad xaqiijisaa — aad uga dhakhso badan qoraal cusub.
tour.reviewer.s3.title: Caddee dhibci kasta
trust_gap.disclaimer: Qiyamadu waa saadaal AI, ma aha damaanad. Bilow guulaha degdegga ah.
trust_gap.subtitle: AI ayaa akhrida labada tiir + qaybaha hoose oo si mudnaan ah u qiimeeya tallaabooyinka saamaynta ugu badan.
trust_gap.title: Sida loo kor u qaado natiijada kalsoonida
twofa_nag.body: Akoonnada maamulka waa inay 2FA dhigtaan si ay u ilaaliyaan xogta.
twofa_nag.title: Xaqiijinta laba-tallaabo ayaa la talinayaa.
verification.intro_body: Cagaaran: diiwaanku wuxuu xaqiijiyay oo waa la kalsoonaan karaa. Hurdi: AI ayaa falanqeeyay si kalsooni sare leh — bini'aadam waa inuu xaqiijiyo. Cas: la calaamadeeyay ama lama xaqiijin — dib u eeg ka hor sii wadidda.
verification.no_findings: Ma jiraan natiijooyin AI oo la heli karo.
verification.no_online_portal: Ma jiro boog shabakadeed oo la heli karo
verification.no_orgs_hint: Ma jiraan xaqiijinno ururada oo la heli karo.
verification.no_recommendations: Ma jiraan talooyin la heli karo.
